top_signals.title: Oil Soars as Trump Says Iran Truce Over, More Strikes Ahead
top_signals.summary: Oil jumped to a two-week high after the US renewed attacks on Iran and President Donald Trump said an interim peace deal is over, heightening concerns about the free flow of crude from one of the world’s most important energy-producing regions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Zillow, Rocket to Face August FTC Trial Over Rental Listings
top_signals.summary: Zillow Group Inc. and Rocket Companies Inc.’s Redfin are headed to trial next month in the US Federal Trade Commission’s challenge to an apartment-listing partnership, after a judge in Virginia declined a government request to decide the case early.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Officials set to revise MiCA to cover non-EU stablecoin issuers: Report
top_signals.summary: EU officials reportedly plan to consider changes to the Markets in Crypto-Assets framework, dubbed by some as “MiCA 2.0,” in response to a US stablecoin law and rules on tokenized payments and deposits.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Saudi Efforts to Revive Gulf Oil Loadings Run Into Buyer Caution - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Saudi Efforts to Revive Gulf Oil Loadings Run Into Buyer Caution  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Palantir’s real weak spot
top_signals.summary: Pushback to the tech group’s politics may threaten the core of its $330bn business

top_signals.title: Delta launches 'basic business' fares without lounge access, seat selection
top_signals.summary: Delta is launching basic business and other stripped-down premium classes that come with fewer perks.

top_signals.title: Mayor gives green light for 4am Joshua vs Fury fight at Wembley
top_signals.summary: Sadiq Khan has given the green light for a 4am start to the Battle of Britain boxing bout between Anthony Joshua and Tyson Fury if it is held at Wembley Stadium. Sources close to the Mayor of London told City AM it is “doable” in a move that would make for TV-friendly viewing times in [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: EU unveils cyber plan to reduce reliance on foreign AI systems
top_signals.summary: The communication, adopted in Strasbourg on July 7, is built around three pillars: making frontier AI “safe, accessible and deployable” for European cybersecurity, preparing the EU’s cyber ecosystem and scaling European AI capabilities.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
